title: GraphNode
description: Schema-agnostic envelope for a collaborative knowledge-graph node, with per-merge-unit CRDT metadata. Generic in transit, typed at the app edge. See ADR-0001.

id.description: Stable identity. Immutable; never stamped, never merged.

type.description: Discriminator selecting the receiving app's deserializer / NodeSchema (e.g. 'ClassBox'). Immutable.

payload.description: Domain field values keyed by field name. The engine never interprets these; only the app that registered `type` does. The reserved key '__deleted__' (boolean) is the tombstone flag.

stamps.description: One CRDT stamp per merge unit declared by the node's NodeSchema. The reserved unit '__tomb__' stamps the '__deleted__' payload flag so deletion LWWs against edits uniformly.

hlc.description: Hybrid Logical Clock in canonical lexicographically-sortable form (package:crdt encoding). String comparison yields causal order.

origin.description: Client id that produced this write. Used for echo-suppression. Redundant with the nodeId embedded in `hlc` when package:crdt is the producer; stored explicitly so non-crdt producers remain valid and echo-suppression needs no HLC parser. See ADR-0001 decision 1.
